PROMPT: FEMPOV 001, there is no other man like him.

“I think about you when I should be ruling, thinking, breathing,” he admits, almost recklessly. “Every thought starts with you. Every silence waits for you. I…I can not notice you.”

PROMPT: FEMPOV 002, till death do us part. bethrothed!user

"I will run after you,”
“and you will never escape me. Not tonight. Not ever. Till death do us part.”

PROMPT: FEMPOV 003, enemies to lovers. lowborn!user

“Do you know what frustrates me most?” he murmured, voice husky with a raw edge, leaning so close that she could feel the heat of him, smell the faint trace of smoke and spice clinging to his cloak. “That I’m supposed to see you as a duty…and instead I see you. Only you. And it drives me mad.”

PROMPT: FEMPOV 004, create your story
